faq.question: <p>What type of maintenance is required for the Skinny Bun Bulkhead?</p>
faq.answer: <p>With our&nbsp;10 year warranty on the core and a 5 year warranty on the scuff Plate the Skinny Bun requires minimal maintenance.</p>
faq.catdescription: FAQ for ITW Insulated Products Skinny Bun

faq.question: <p>Will the bulkhead tear on the bottom as it is moved around inside of the trailer?</p>
faq.answer: <p>We build&nbsp;the Skinny Bun bulkheads with a 100% pure UHMW (Ultra High Molecular Weight) scuff plate &ndash; not a blend of UHMW and HDPE. The 100 % pure UHMW doesn&rsquo;t degrade when dragged across an abrasive surface which provides for maximum integrity.</p>
faq.catdescription: FAQ for ITW Insulated Products Skinny Bun

faq.question: <p>Is there any hardware such as bolts at the scuff plate area?</p>
faq.answer: <p>The UHMW scuff plate has a no-bolt surface. There are no through bolts to get&nbsp;sheared off from equipment which causes damage to the bulkhead core.</p>
faq.catdescription: FAQ for ITW Insulated Products Skinny Bun

faq.question: <p>What&nbsp;type of warranty do you offer on the vinyl&nbsp;for possible &ldquo;sag&rdquo; or delamination?</p>
faq.answer: <p>There is a 10 year warranty against delamination</p>
faq.catdescription: FAQ for ITW Insulated Products Skinny Bun

faq.question: <span style="color: #000000;">How many other options are available to accessorize my bulkhead?</span>
faq.answer: The Fan Kit , Vent kit, Two way hinge, Double reinforced perimeter And stenciling available.
faq.catdescription: FAQ for ITW Insulated Products Skinny Bun

faq.question: <p>Will the E or F straps area where they clip into the logistic track get damaged ?</p>
faq.answer: <p>We have the UHMW wear guard material at that location to protect the perimeter seal of the bulkhead.</p>
faq.catdescription: FAQ for ITW Insulated Products Skinny Bun

faq.question: <p>What kind of material are the handles?</p>
faq.answer: Industrial strength rubber/nylon webbing for durability.
faq.catdescription: FAQ for ITW Insulated Products Skinny Bun

faq.question: <p>What type of handles are available?</p>
faq.answer: <p>The handles are an ergonomic design that provides a comfort grip for bulkhead Positioning.</p>
faq.catdescription: FAQ for ITW Insulated Products Skinny Bun

faq.question: <p>Are the Insulated bulkheads washable?</p>
faq.answer: <p>The insulated bulkhead core is completely sealed and the gaskets provide no Area for contaminates to penetrate.</p>
faq.catdescription: FAQ for ITW Insulated Products Skinny Bun

faq.question: <p>If I order E or F straps installed on my bulkhead where will they be installed?</p>
faq.answer: <p>We do not determine the location we request that you provide the measurement From the floor up to the center of each track. The most common location is 30” &amp; 60” To center.</p>
faq.catdescription: FAQ for ITW Insulated Products Skinny Bun

faq.question: <p>What colors are available for the Skinny Bun?</p>
faq.answer: <p>The standard color is maroon. Other colors are available but may have a longer Lead time.</p>
faq.catdescription: FAQ for ITW Insulated Products Skinny Bun

faq.question: <p>Is there any hardware on the bulkhead that protrudes out?</p>
faq.answer: <p>The low profile bolts will help prevent injuries to drivers and will Also help prevent damage to the product</p>

faq.question: <p>What type of material is the gasket perimeter?</p>
faq.answer: <p>The perimeter gasket is comprised of high standard open cell foam with outstanding memory and compression which prevents deterioration. The gasket seal construction keeps out moisture and contaminates.</p>
faq.catdescription: FAQ for ITW Insulated Products Skinny Bun

faq.question: <p>Can I repair the outside gasket area if it gets damaged?</p>
faq.answer: <p>The gasket can be repaired in minutes.</p>
faq.catdescription: FAQ for ITW Insulated Products Skinny Bun

faq.question: <p>How many layers of vinyl makes up the center hinge?</p>
faq.answer: <p>The hinge is constructed of 6 layers of 18 oz vinyl sewn and glued together to Provide superior strength and durability</p>
faq.catdescription: FAQ for ITW Insulated Products Skinny Bun

faq.question: <p>What is the difference between open cell foam and other foams?</p>
faq.answer: <p>The open cell foam is superior because it is lighter weight than the closed-cell. The open cell (air cell) foam provides superior insulating properties and flexibility which includes “memory”</p>
faq.catdescription: FAQ for ITW Insulated Products Skinny Bun

faq.question: <p>What type of material is on the inside of the Skinny Bun Bulkhead?</p>
faq.answer: <p>The premium core is constructed of flexible open cell foam and hard corrugated plastic that is puncture and tear resistant.</p>
faq.catdescription: FAQ for ITW Insulated Products Skinny Bun

faq.question: <p>What is the outside skin of the Skinny Bun bulkhead constructed of?</p>
faq.answer: <p>The outside of the skinny bun is a multi layer vinyl lamination process that provides a durable long life core.</p>
faq.catdescription: FAQ for ITW Insulated Products Skinny Bun

faq.question: <p>How long has the Skinny Bun been in the Transport refrigeration industry?</p>
faq.answer: <p>The Skinny Bun bulkhead has been in the industry for over 25 years.</p>
faq.catdescription: FAQ for ITW Insulated Products Skinny Bun
